creator: r@rfmoz.eu
text:
Created attachment 236787
Patch to upgrade port to Tuptime 5.2.1

Hi,


Tuptime have a new release (5.2.1) and it would be nice to have it on FreeBSD.

Changelog:

  * Return -e option as an argument for --dec decimals                                                                                                                                        
  * Add rc script for OpenBSD and update installation doc                                                                                                                                     
  * Deprecate --pctl option                                                                                                                                                                   
  * Adding -E, --exclude option                                                                                                                                                               
  * Print longest uptime and downtime values on default output                                                                                                                                
  * Code refactoring

Please, see the attached patch with the PORT upgrade changes.



Thanks,
